§6Charged Staff§f:
The §6Charged Staff §f(appliedenergistics2:charged_staff) is a §6charged tool §f that §6interacts with §f §6Charged Certus Quartz Ore §f and §6Charged Certus Quartz Crystals §f. It is the §6primary tool §f for early-game §6Certus Quartz processing §f.

§6Production Path (tools/misctools_charged_staff.json)§f:
Pattern "a  /  b /   b" (an asymmetric 3x3 pattern):
- §ba§f: §6Charged Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:1) — 1 (top left)
- §bb§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 3 (middle + bottom)
- Yields 1× Charged Staff

§6Function§f:
- §bCharged ore interaction §f: right-click a §6Charged Certus Quartz Ore §f to §6trigger growth §f of nearby §6Certus Quartz Buds §f
- §bSky-stone compass §f: the staff is functionally similar to a §6Sky Compass §f — see §6Meteorite Compass §f quest
- §bCharging §f: place it in a §6Charger §f to refill its internal charge
- §bInternal charge §f: stored in its own §6internal §f charge buffer
- §bPower cost §f: §b1 §f per right-click

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Charged Staff is a component of, but it is referenced in 1 §6use site §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bEarly Certus Quartz processing §f: speed up the §6Charged §f conversion
- §bSky-stone detection §f: find a §6meteorite §f without a Compass

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: pair the §6Charged Staff §f with a §6Charger §f to keep it charged
- §eTip§f: the Charged Staff is the §6most accessible §f Certus Quartz tool — craft one as soon as you have §6Iron Ingots §f and a §6Charged Certus Quartz Crystal §f
- §cWarning§f: the Charged Staff is §cinferior §f to the §6Entropy Manipulator §f in §bfunctionality §f; use the Entropy Manipulator for §6maintenance §f
- §cWarning§f: the Charged Staff §cdrains charge §f quickly; keep it in a §6Charger §f between uses
